## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Tooling / chore (`chore:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Contributor License Agreement](../CLA.md) (opening this PR counts as acceptance).
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`.
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds.
- [ ] I used Conventional Commit messages.
- [ ] I did not commit any secrets, credentials, or `.pfx` files.
- [ ] Renderer↔main calls (if any) go through the IPC allowlist with Zod validation.
- [ ] Project file access stays read-only (except Code Sync mirror destinations).
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
